commands: echo '[1.5/6] Symlink python → python3.11 (runner spawns python, not python3.11)...'
echo '[2/6] Install Chromium system deps for Playwright (AL2023 dnf names)...'
sudo dnf install -y nss nspr nss-util atk at-spi2-atk cups-libs libdrm libXcomposite libXdamage libXrandr libXtst libXScrnSaver mesa-libgbm pango alsa-lib libxkbcommon 2>&1 | tail -5
echo '[3/6] Pull latest repo + npm install + playwright chromium...'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform && git pull && npm install 2>&1 | tail -3 && npx playwright install chromium 2>&1 | tail -3'
echo '[4/6] Install Python packages (BrowserGym + WebArena + SSIM)...'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'python3.11 -m pip install --user --quiet gymnasium browsergym-webarena Pillow numpy requests scikit-image 2>&1 | tail -3'
echo '[4.5/6] Install Python Playwright chromium (separate from Node Playwright)...'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'python -m playwright install chromium 2>&1 | tail -3'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'python3.11 -c "import browsergym.webarena, PIL, numpy, skimage, playwright.sync_api; print(\"python deps ok\")" && python3.11 -m pip install --user --quiet "litellm[proxy]" 2>&1 | tail -2 && ~/.local/bin/litellm --version 2>&1 | head -3'
echo '[6/6] Connectivity check against WebArena IP 10.0.1.50...'
